description.zh-Hans: 根据选择模式将多张输入图像之一路由到输出。支持基于索引、阈值和噪声的选择方式。
description.en: Routes one of several input images to output based on selection mode. Supports index-based, threshold, and noise-based selection.

triggers.zh-Hans: 选择器, 输入选择, 多路选择, 索引选择, 阈值选择, 噪声选择
triggers.en: selector, input select, multiplexer, index select, threshold select, noise select

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 根据索引值从A/B/C/D四路输入中选择一路输出。
exampleUsage.en: Select one output from A/B/C/D inputs based on an index value.
